productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Blue & Black Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 27 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 11 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Has one zippered compartment, two inner zippers and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentials Two short handles, a short strap on the front and a long adjustable and removable strap for carrying ease and style Brand name appliqué d on the front One zippered pocket at the back for additional space Leatherette strap design with mettalic studs on the front and back for styling Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
